data_source: Alpaca real market data via qfa backtest (no --data-csv; no CSV fixtures)

qfa.command: set -a; source /Users/moonk/.hermes/profiles/alphaaoi/secrets/alpaca.env; set +a; export ALPACA_API_KEY="${ALPACA_API_KEY:-${ALPACA_KEY_ID:-}}"; export ALPACA_PAPER=true; /Users/moonk/quant-for-agent/.venv/bin/qfa backtest run /Users/moonk/quant-for-agent/models/overnight-gap-reversal-megacap-v1/model.py --symbols AAPL,MSFT,NVDA,AMZN,META,GOOGL,TSLA --start 2024-01-01 --end 2025-12-31 --timeframe 1Day --initial-cash 100000 --db /Users/moonk/quant-for-agent/models/overnight-gap-reversal-megacap-v1/evaluations/qfa_realdata.sqlite3 > /Users/moonk/quant-for-agent/models/overnight-gap-reversal-megacap-v1/evaluations/runs/qfa_realdata_20240101_20251231_run1.json
qfa.db_retention_note: SQLite DB artifact removed before commit per alpha-model-management large artifact policy; compact JSON/Markdown summaries retained.

implementation_limitation: qfa daily bars/backtester evaluate signals on the latest completed daily bar and apply weights to the next close-to-close return, so this is a lagged proxy for true same-day open-to-close overnight gap reversal execution.
suggested_decision: reject_or_research_watchlist_only; negative Sharpe and large drawdown fail AR-007 acceptance threshold before costs
refinement_child_idea: AR-007-R1: Test true open-to-close overnight-gap reversal with an open-aware evaluator and volatility/market-regime filters to reduce lagged proxy error and drawdown.
divergent_child_idea: AR-007-D1: Mega-cap post-earnings drift continuation using earnings-calendar/event dates and multi-day holding windows rather than overnight gap fading.
warnings: Costs/slippage were not applied because qfa backtest CLI exposes no cost/slippage parameter; reported metrics are pre-cost.
SQLite artifact evaluations/qfa_realdata.sqlite3 was created under the model folder and should be removed by controller before commit if required.
No accepted alpha return-stream library was used for orthogonality checks in this pass.
Open-aware execution cannot be represented by current daily qfa close-to-close backtester.
